text: You guys actually saw the spirit of a woman?
Yes, that's right. Just down the street there was a woman standing there in the middle of the road
dressed in an old-fashioned Victorian costume.
When we started walking towards her, she just literally disappeared into the wall in front of all of us.
And it literally freaked the crowd out.
Because it was the first time for a long time that a whole crowd, including myself, actually saw a ghost.
